title: 12 Pcs Gold Christmas Foil Garland Festive Ceiling Hanging Decorations,Christmas Ceiling Decorations,FoilChristmas Decorations for Indoor Outdoor Foil Garland Festive Hanging Decorations(Gold)
features: Package Includes: This set includes 12 elegant gold foil garlands, each designed to add a touch of sophistication and sparkle to your holiday decor, enhancing the festive atmosphere of your home or event space.

Durable & Long-Lasting Material: Made from high-quality PET material, these garlands are lightweight yet durable, ensuring they maintain their shine and structure throughout the holiday season and beyond. They are easy to handle, store, and reuse, making them a reliable decor item for years to come.

Perfect Dimensions for Versatile Use: Each garland measures approximately 19x19 cm (7.48x7.48 inches) when collapsed, and extends up to 2.8m (79 inches) when fully opened. This provides ample coverage to suit a variety of decorating needs, from small spaces to large festive displays.

Effortless Setup & Customization: Decorating is quick and easy with these garlands. Simply pull them apart from the middle and extend to your desired length. Their flexible design allows for easy shaping and adjustment, perfect for draping across mantels, windows, doorways, or wrapping around Christmas trees and banisters.

Versatile & Elegant Decor: These shimmering gold garlands are ideal for enhancing holiday events such as Christmas, weddings, birthday parties, or New Year’s celebrations. Their luxurious appearance adds a festive touch to any occasion, making them an essential addition to your seasonal decorating collection.
